strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience with direct mastery of primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB) across senior roles at re:cinq, Optilyz, and RIDE Capital
Current expertise in AI agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq directly addresses required AI agent development skill

Strong engineering fundamentals demonstrated through polyglot proficiency (Java, C++, D, Swift), proven TDD adoption across multiple companies, and successful open-source projects (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js framework despite it being primary stack; while Node.js expertise is strong, framework-specific experience is absent
Testing framework expertise not explicitly detailed (Vitest, Jest, Playwright not listed) despite clear TDD commitment; testing background is inferred rather than demonstrated
Resume is lengthy and chronologically dense with projects from 2012-2015 era that may obscure focus on recent tech stack alignment and current role's relevance

key_factors.factor: Full-stack TypeScript/Node.js mastery across senior roles

response.justification: Candidate significantly exceeds experience threshold (10+ years vs. 6+ required) with direct expertise in core technologies and current involvement in AI agent infrastructure—a required skill. Demonstrated strong software engineering culture fit through consistent TDD adoption, teaching workshops, and open-source contributions. Primary weakness is lack of explicit Nest.js experience, though exceptional Node.js/TypeScript foundation suggests rapid framework adoption. Testing framework specifics (Vitest, Jest, Playwright) are not explicitly listed but implied through career-long testing emphasis. Overall a high-caliber, overqualified candidate who exceeds technical requirements.
